body.title: NetworkProxy — unified outbound HTTP with aggregate health view
body.result: NetworkProxy singleton in igor/network/proxy.py: get/post/post_json, per-host HostStats (call_count, error_count, p50/p95 latency, 500-sample cap), report_str(). get_network_proxy_report tool added to metrics.py. Callers opt-in — no forced migration. 16 tests pass.
body.description: budget.py, embedder, cluster_router, OR reasoner, discord each roll their own timeout and retry. No aggregate view of external call health. Need: single HTTP client wrapper, per-host timeout/retry config, call count + failure rate + latency, feeds /audit.
